name: hay-session
command: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && { [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && PY=.venv/bin/python || PY=python3; } && HAY_BACKEND="${HAY_BACKEND:-mlx}" "$PY" -m pruner session
description: Hay session lease — ensures the machine-wide manager is up and keeps it warm while this session is alive
